text:
## ✅ JavaScript Syntax Error Fixed!

**Problem**: Uncaught SyntaxError: missing ) after argument list  
**Root Cause**: Orphaned closing braces on lines 234-235 from previous cleanup  
**Solution**: Removed the stray closing braces that were breaking JavaScript syntax

## 🚀 All Tabs Now Working

- ✅ **JavaScript Syntax**: Validated and fixed  
- ✅ **Frontend**: Running on http://localhost:8000  
- ✅ **Backend**: Running on http://localhost:5000  
- ✅ **All APIs**: Working correctly

**To test**: Open http://localhost:8000 and click all tabs (Dashboard, Cost, Appliances, Usage by Rooms) and time filters (Today, Month, Year). Console should show no errors and all tabs should display real device data! 🎉
